## What this changes

A short description of the change.

## Why

The reason or the issue it addresses (link it: `Closes #123`).

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested locally (`python3 -m http.server 8000`, then opened `http://localhost:8000`)
- [ ] The draw still works: BEGIN → smoke → card flip → meaning → contact
- [ ] Looks right on a phone width and a desktop width
- [ ] Still honors `prefers-reduced-motion`
- [ ] Screenshots / recording attached if the change is visual
